app.name: BudgetBuddy
app.tagline: Type it like you say it. Let BudgetBuddy handle the rest.

auth.login_subtitle: Sign in to continue your financial journey
auth.register_subtitle: Join and take control of your finances
auth.username_hint: ℹ️ 3–20 characters · Only letters, numbers, underscores (_) · Cannot start with a number

errors.username_too_short: 👤 Username must be at least 3 characters long.
errors.username_too_long: 👤 Username cannot be longer than 20 characters.
errors.username_invalid_chars: 👤 Only letters, numbers, and underscores (_) allowed.
errors.username_starts_digit: 👤 Username cannot start with a number.
errors.password_too_short: 🔑 Password must be at least 8 characters long.
errors.password_no_digit: 🔢 Password must contain at least one number.
errors.username_taken: ❌ Username '{username}' is already taken. Please choose a different one.
errors.enter_both: Please enter both username and password.

goals.title: Smart Goal Setting
goals.desc: Set and track financial goals with intelligent progress insights.

analytics.title: Advanced Analytics
analytics.desc: Beautiful charts and ML-powered spending predictions.

ai.title: AI Assistant
ai.desc: AI categorizes expenses and gives personalized advice.

security.title: Secure & Private
security.desc: bcrypt-encrypted passwords. Your data stays yours.

dashboard.title: Financial Dashboard
dashboard.no_transactions_desc: Add your first transaction to see your dashboard come alive.

tips.title: 💡 Smart Financial Tips
tips.critical: 🚨 Spending >90% of income! Cut non-essentials ASAP.
tips.warning: ⚠️ Spending >70% of income. Try to save more.
tips.advice: 📌 Aim to save at least 20% of your monthly income.
tips.no_income: 📌 Add some income transactions to see spending ratio tips.

add_transaction.title: Add a New Transaction
add_transaction.input_placeholder: e.g. Spent ₹250 on lunch at Subway

errors.parse_failed: Could not parse. Please include an amount (e.g., ₹250).

upload_receipt.title: Upload Receipt
upload_receipt.parse_failed: Could not parse. Try a clearer image.

fetch_emails.title: Fetch Transactions from Gmail
fetch_emails.info: Scans your Gmail inbox for transaction emails and imports them automatically.

view_transactions.title: All Transactions
view_transactions.no_transactions_desc: Try adjusting filters or add new transactions.

savings.title: Savings Goals
savings.no_goals_desc: Set your first savings goal on the left!

errors.missing_fields: Please enter a name and target amount.

insights.title: Financial Insights
insights.prediction_high: ⚠️ Next month looks significantly more expensive.
insights.prediction_low: 🎉 Next month looks lighter on expenses!

settings.title: Settings
settings.theme_caption: Pick a colour theme — it applies instantly across the entire app.
